name: Personal Blizzard

spell.name: Personal Blizzard

heightened.text: The cold damage and persistent cold damage increase by 1 (2 on a critical failure).

spell.success: The target takes 1d6 cold damage, and the spell ends.
spell.failure: The target takes 1d6 cold damage and 1d6 persistent cold damage. The persistent damage automatically ends when the spell ends. It is concealed to other creatures, and other creatures are concealed to it.
spell.critical_failure: As failure, but both the cold damage and the persistent cold damage are 2d6.

text: Your patron's breath becomes a blizzard of obscuring, scouring ice that follows your target. The target attempts a Fortitude save.
